languages.text: {n}Себериан едва заметно качает головой.{/n} "Возможно, отдать меня твари было бы лучшим решением для нас обоих..."
{n}Seberian gives a slight shake of his head.{/n} "Perhaps giving me over to the creature would have been the best choice for both of us..."
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан едва заметно качает головой.{/n} "Возможно, отдать меня твари было бы лучшим решением для нас обоих..."

languages.text: {n}Seberian niega levemente con la cabeza.{/n} «Tal vez hubiera sido mejor para ambos que me entregara a la criatura...».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian gives a slight shake of his head.{/n} "Perhaps giving me over to the creature would have been the best choice for both of us..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian niega levemente con la cabeza.{/n} «Tal vez hubiera sido mejor para ambos que me entregara a la criatura...».

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安微微摇了摇头。{/n}“或许把我交给那东西，对我们两个来说才是最好的选择……”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian gives a slight shake of his head.{/n} "Perhaps giving me over to the creature would have been the best choice for both of us..."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安微微摇了摇头。{/n}“或许把我交给那东西，对我们两个来说才是最好的选择……”

languages.text: {n}Seberian secoue légèrement la tête.{/n} « Dans notre intérêt à tous les deux, il aurait peut-être été préférable que vous me livriez à cette créature... »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian gives a slight shake of his head.{/n} "Perhaps giving me over to the creature would have been the best choice for both of us..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian secoue légèrement la tête.{/n} « Dans notre intérêt à tous les deux, il aurait peut-être été préférable que vous me livriez à cette créature... »

languages.text: {n}Seberian hafifçe başını sallıyor.{/n} "Belki de beni o yaratığa teslim etmen, ikimiz için de en iyisi olur..."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian gives a slight shake of his head.{/n} "Perhaps giving me over to the creature would have been the best choice for both of us..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian hafifçe başını sallıyor.{/n} "Belki de beni o yaratığa teslim etmen, ikimiz için de en iyisi olur..."

languages.text: {n}Seberian schüttelt den Kopf.{/n} "Vielleicht wäre es für uns beide das Beste gewesen, mich der Kreatur zu überlassen ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian gives a slight shake of his head.{/n} "Perhaps giving me over to the creature would have been the best choice for both of us..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian schüttelt den Kopf.{/n} "Vielleicht wäre es für uns beide das Beste gewesen, mich der Kreatur zu überlassen ..."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは首を少し振った。{/n}「私をその生き物に渡すのが、私たちにとって最善の選択だったかもしれない…」
